arts.ttl: NL round-up: Kolo Muani double gives 10-player France victory in Belgium
arts.sum: Two goals from Randal Kolo Muani gave 10-man France a 2-1 win over Belgium in their UEFA Nations League clash in Brussels.

arts.ttl: Why isn’t Kylian Mbappé playing for France against Belgium?
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé is not part of France’s squad for their Nations League fixtures against Israel and Belgium after picking up a thigh injury in a recent domestic fixture. When will Kylian Mbappé return for Real Madrid?

arts.ttl: Belgium Player Wears Kit Without Adidas Logo
arts.sum: In a rare and unusual occurrence, Leandro Trossard took to the pitch wearing Belgium's 2024 home kit without the Adidas logo during the second half of Belgium's UEFA Nations League clash against Italy, which ended in a 2-2 draw.

arts.ttl: Belgium vs France – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Belgium and France meet in the UEFA Nations League on Monday night, as the neighbours battle to reach the competition’s finals. The hosts are third in the group, with France sat second after recovering from defeat on matchday one to earn back-to-back wins.
